data.id: TR-PICUS-EXECUTION-002: Suspicious Rundll32 and WScript Execution Patterns
data.name: TR-PICUS-EXECUTION-002: Suspicious Rundll32 and WScript Execution Patterns
data.description: Detects suspicious rundll32.exe and wscript.exe execution patterns used to execute arbitrary DLL or VBS files. Monitors for rundll32 loading non-standard DLLs, and WScript executing downloaded or temp-located scripts. Common bypass for execution restrictions. MITRE T1218.011, T1059.005.
data.contents: (process.name contains 'rundll32.exe' OR process.name contains 'wscript.exe' OR process.name contains 'cscript.exe') AND ((process.command_line contains '.dll' OR process.command_line contains '.vbs' OR process.command_line contains '.js') AND (process.path contains '\\Temp\\' OR process.path contains '\\AppData\\' OR process.parent.path contains '\\Temp\\' OR process.parent.path contains '\\AppData\\'))
